## Summary

<!-- Describe the user-visible behavior and why the change is needed. -->

## Validation

- [ ] Added or updated a focused regression test for behavior changes.
- [ ] Ran `npm test` successfully.
- [ ] Ran `npm run check` successfully.
- [ ] Verified relevant SillyTavern behavior manually, or documented why live verification is not applicable.

## Risk review

- [ ] Preserved schema-v8 and canonical identity contracts.
- [ ] Preserved analyzer isolation and deterministic reconstruction.
- [ ] Escaped user-controlled HTML and retained keyboard/mobile accessibility where UI changed.
- [ ] Introduced no runtime dependency or build step.
